name: Ryan Hennebry

contact.email: (hyperlinked as 'Email' in PDF, not shown as plain text)
contact.linkedin: (hyperlinked as 'LinkedIn' in PDF, URL not shown as plain text)
contact.github: (hyperlinked as 'GitHub' in PDF, URL not shown as plain text)

summary: First employee at Minima, working directly with the founders for 4+ years as the company scaled from seed to Series A. Took ownership wherever needed across fundraising, operations, go-to-market, and community-led growth. Now building AI agents to create leverage for startup teams.

experience.title: Career Break
bullets: Sabbatical: Travelled solo through Asia after 4+ years at Minima, from seed to Series A.
AI Agents: Built agents with Claude Code for competitor-intel and growth-experiments, turning market signals into repeatable research workflows and clear recommendations for startup teams.

experience.title: First employee (overall tenure)
bullets: First employee: Worked directly with founders as Minima scaled from 1 to 30 people.

experience.title: Marketing Manager
bullets: GTM: Delivered $4.5m from a community-led presale on a $300k budget (15× ROI); led go-to-market and defined Minima's positioning and messaging.
Events: Secured sponsorships and keynote slots that connected founders with investors, contributing to Minima's $6.5m Series A raise.
Lifecycle: Generated 5k presale conversions from a 50k community email list via segmentation, A/B testing, and targeted messaging.
Content: Built and grew Minima's content engine across the blog (30k visitors), YouTube (5k subscribers), and X (40k followers).
PR: Managed PR agencies and distributed content that reached 2m views (Bloomberg, Yahoo Finance, HackerNoon).

experience.title: Community Manager
bullets: Community Growth: Grew Discord and Telegram to 100k members via an ambassador programme and developer hackathon series.
User Onboarding: Implemented Minima's node-runner programme, onboarding 50k users and scaling the network to 75k nodes.

experience.title: Founder's Associate
bullets: Operations: Managed internal updates, team coordination, hiring support, and cross-functional execution across fast-moving priorities.
Fundraising: Supported Minima's $2.5m seed round by handling investor enquiries, building pitch decks, and delivering investor updates.
Founder Support: Turned ambiguous founder priorities into workstreams across operations, fundraising, and market research.

experience.title: Content Marketer
bullets: User Growth: Acquired 20k exchange users through technical content creation and distribution.

experience.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Error Analysis: Identified Alexa failure patterns and improved query success rate to 98%.

projects: AI Agents (Career Break): Built agents with Claude Code for competitor-intel and growth-experiments, turning market signals into repeatable research workflows and clear recommendations for startup teams.
other_sections.notes: No standalone Skills section on the CV. Skills are implied within experience bullets only. Contact details (email, LinkedIn, GitHub) are hyperlinks in the PDF; underlying URLs/addresses are not exposed as plain text. Filename references 'Ankar' but the CV body contains NO Ankar-specific summary line, reordered skills, or company tailoring.

requirement_match_signals.degree: Bachelor's degree — BA/BSc Business Management, University of Leeds, 2:1 (Upper Second Class Honours), 2017. Non-technical degree. UNCHANGED vs baseline.
requirement_match_signals.programming_languages: No formal programming languages or proficiency levels listed. Technical literacy signalled via 'Built agents with Claude Code', node-runner network operations, and a Data Analyst role at Amazon Alexa (query analysis). No evidence of professional software engineering in Python/JS/etc. UNCHANGED vs baseline.
requirement_match_signals.leadership_scope: No explicit direct-report team-size stated. Was first employee as company scaled 1→30 people; led cross-functional GTM, managed PR agencies, ran ambassador programmes and a developer hackathon series. Founder's Associate bullet now explicitly adds 'hiring support'. Leadership remains functional/programme ownership rather than documented people-management headcount.
requirement_match_signals.fundraising_finance: Strong, repeated fundraising exposure: supported $2.5m seed round (investor enquiries, pitch decks, investor updates); contributed to $6.5m Series A via investor-connecting events; delivered $4.5m community-led presale on $300k budget (15× ROI). Investor-facing and revenue/budget-accountable. UNCHANGED vs baseline.
requirement_match_signals.customer_facing_delivery: Heavy community-facing and user-facing growth: grew Discord/Telegram to 100k members, onboarded 50k node-runner users, acquired 20k exchange users. Investor-facing and PR-facing. Community-led GTM rather than classic B2B enterprise sales/delivery; no explicit enterprise account or implementation-delivery experience stated. UNCHANGED vs baseline.
requirement_match_signals.domain_expertise: Crypto / blockchain / Web3 (Minima is a blockchain protocol; Blockchain Board of Derivatives is a crypto exchange). Early-stage startup operations and go-to-market. Emerging AI-agent / Claude Code tooling, now framed as building 'repeatable research workflows'. Not fintech-regulated, legal, or healthtech.
requirement_match_signals.work_authorization: Based Cambridge, UK; relocating to London. UK work history throughout. Strong UK work-authorization signal; no explicit visa/citizenship statement on the CV. No US/EU authorization indicated. UNCHANGED vs baseline.
requirement_match_signals.tailored_to: Filename references 'Ankar', but the CV body contains NO Ankar mentions or company-specific tailoring. No Ankar-specific summary line, no reordered skills, no emphasis shift. It is the same generic startup-operator/founding-generalist CV positioned around 'building AI agents to create leverage for startup teams'. Treat as a general-purpose CV, not an Ankar-tailored document.

total_years: ~8.7 years total professional history (Oct 2017 – present), of which ~6.4 years are working experience and ~1.8 years (Aug 2023–present) is a career break that includes self-directed AI-agent building. ~4.4 years at Minima.
seniority: Mid-level startup operator / founding-generalist. Founder-adjacent (Founder's Associate + first employee working directly with founders), with manager-level functional titles (Marketing Manager, Community Manager) but no documented director/VP/head-of title or explicit people-management headcount. UNCHANGED vs baseline.

No new skills, no new programming languages, no new quantified achievements, no changed dates/years, no changed seniority, no new domain. The only substantive additions are micro-signals: (1) 'hiring support' under Founder's Associate — a slight uptick in people-ops/leadership breadth, and (2) the AI work reframed as 'repeatable research workflows' — slightly stronger systems-thinking/process signal for AI-tooling or ops-automation roles.
